mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FOOD_TRAN ( USER_UUID , EAT_DATE , EAT_STIME , EAT_ETIME , FOOD_NAME , FOOD_DANWI , FOOD_CNT , FOOD_ACNT , FOOD_MSEQ , REG_DTTM , MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{eatDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y%m%d'), #{eatStime}, #{eatEtime}, #{foodName}, #{foodDanwi}, 1, #{foodAcnt}, 1, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}, EAT_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{eatDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y%m%d'), EAT_STIME = #{eatStime}, EAT_ETIME = #{eatEtime}, FOOD_NAME = #{foodName}, FOOD_DANWI = #{foodDanwi}, FOOD_CNT = 1, FOOD_ACNT = #{foodAcnt}, FOOD_MSEQ = 1, MOD_DTTM = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT FOOD_SEQ AS foodSeq, USER_UUID AS userUuid, EAT_DATE AS eatDate, EAT_STIME AS eatStime, EAT_ETIME AS eatEtime, FOOD_NAME AS foodName, FOOD_DANWI AS foodDanwi, FOOD_CNT AS foodCnt, FOOD_ACNT AS foodAcnt, FOOD_MSEQ AS foodMseq FROM T_FOOD_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid} AND EAT_DATE = #{eatDate} AND EAT_STIME = #{eatStime} ORDER BY FOOD_SEQ

SELECT MIN(FOOD_SEQ) AS foodSeq, USER_UUID AS userUuid, EAT_DATE AS eatDate, EAT_STIME AS eatStime, CONCAT(CASE WHEN HOUR(MAX(REG_DTTM)) < 12 THEN '오전' ELSE '오후' END, ' ', DATE_FORMAT(MAX(REG_DTTM), '%h:%i')) AS regDtm, GROUP_CONCAT(FOOD_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') AS foodName, COUNT(*) AS foodCnt FROM T_FOOD_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid} AND EAT_DATE = #{eatDate} GROUP BY USER_UUID, EAT_DATE, EAT_STIME ORDER BY EAT_STIME
